description_long: This object consists of two ribbed, metallic-looking buckets suspended from a central, organic-shaped support that resembles a stylized tree branch or post. The buckets are attached by curved handles, which are looped over the ends of the horizontal arms of the support. The buckets have a weathered, slightly tarnished appearance, with visible horizontal bands and a subtle greenish-gray patina. The central support is smooth and tapers upward, with a naturalistic, flowing form that suggests it may be made of wood or metal shaped to mimic wood. The overall design is both functional and decorative, evoking a rustic or traditional urban setting. The buckets appear hollow and capable of holding water or other materials.
description: A pair of ribbed, metallic buckets suspended from a stylized, branch-like central support, with curved handles and a weathered finish.
description_view_0: Front view showing both buckets hanging from the central support, with the left bucket more prominent.
description_view_1: Direct side view with both buckets equally visible, highlighting the symmetry of the support and the ribbed texture.
description_view_2: Rear angled view emphasizing the curvature of the support and the overlapping buckets.
description_view_3: Back view showing the central support and the backs of both buckets, with handles clearly visible.
